title: JSON schema for l10n in the bundle View Exports SVG extension for Visual Studio Code

{kind} icons.patternErrorMessage: The message must contain the variable {kind}
{kind} icons.description: A message with a variable {kind} that can be replaced with a specific kind of icons, e.g., 'favorite' or 'recent'.

Component with name \"{name}\" not found.default: Component with name "{name}" not found in file "{file}"
Component with name \"{name}\" not found.patternErrorMessage: The message must contain the variables {name} and {file}
Component with name \"{name}\" not found.description: A message with variables {name} and {file} that can be replaced with the name of the component and the file where it is defined.

ConfigRegistry not initialized. Call ini.default: ConfigRegistry not initialized. Call initConfig(context) first.

Default icon properties changed. Reload.default: Default icon properties changed. Reload the panel to apply.

Error creating and saving the file. Try.default: Error creating and saving the file. Try again.

Error editing component: {error}.patternErrorMessage: The message must contain the variable {error}
Error editing component: {error}.description: A message with a variable {error} that can be replaced with the specific error message when editing a component fails.

Error extracting SVG component: {error}.patternErrorMessage: The message must contain the variable {error}
Error extracting SVG component: {error}.description: A message with a variable {error} that can be replaced with the specific error message when extracting an SVG component fails.

Error extracting icon component: {error}.patternErrorMessage: The message must contain the variable {error}
Error extracting icon component: {error}.description: A message with a variable {error} that can be replaced with the specific error message when extracting an icon component fails.

Error generating SVG component in playgr.default: Error generating SVG component in playground: {error}
Error generating SVG component in playgr.patternErrorMessage: The message must contain the variable {error}
Error generating SVG component in playgr.description: A message with a variable {error} that can be replaced with the specific error message when generating an SVG component in the playground fails.

Error opening file: {file}.patternErrorMessage: The message must contain the variable {file}
Error opening file: {file}.description: A message with a variable {file} that can be replaced with the specific file path when opening a file fails.

Error processing JSX expression containe.patternErrorMessage: The message must contain the variable {error}
Error processing JSX expression containe.description: A message with a variable {error} that can be replaced with the specific error message when processing a JSX expression container fails.

Error processing SVG component in playgr.default: Error processing SVG component in playground.

Error processing file \"{file}\".patternErrorMessage: The message must contain the variable {file}
Error processing file \"{file}\".description: A message with a variable {file} that can be replaced with the specific file path when processing a file fails.

Error processing files for reload: {erro.patternErrorMessage: The message must contain the variable {error}
Error processing files for reload: {erro.description: A message with a variable {error} that can be replaced with the specific error message when processing files for reload fails.

Error reading directory \"{file}\":.patternErrorMessage: The message must contain the variable {file}
Error reading directory \"{file}\":.description: A message with a variable {file} that can be replaced with the specific directory path when reading a directory fails.

Error reading theme file: {path} — {erro.patternErrorMessage: The message must contain the variables {path} and {error}
Error reading theme file: {path} — {erro.description: A message with variables {path} and {error} that can be replaced with the specific theme file path and error message when reading a theme file fails.

Error reading theme package file: {error.patternErrorMessage: The message must contain the variable {error}
Error reading theme package file: {error.description: A message with a variable {error} that can be replaced with the specific error message when reading a theme package file fails.

Error removing assets path: {error}.patternErrorMessage: The message must contain the variable {error}
Error removing assets path: {error}.description: A message with a variable {error} that can be replaced with the specific error message when removing the assets path fails.

Error toggling developer tools: {error}.patternErrorMessage: The message must contain the variable {error}
Error toggling developer tools: {error}.description: A message with a variable {error} that can be replaced with the specific error message when toggling developer tools fails.

Error toggling expanded icons: {error}.patternErrorMessage: The message must contain the variable {error}
Error toggling expanded icons: {error}.description: A message with a variable {error} that can be replaced with the specific error message when toggling expanded icons fails.

Error toggling view actions: {error}.patternErrorMessage: The message must contain the variable {error}
Error toggling view actions: {error}.description: A message with a variable {error} that can be replaced with the specific error message when toggling view actions fails.

Failed to add icon to collection: {messa.default: Failed to add icon to collection: {message}
Failed to add icon to collection: {messa.patternErrorMessage: The message must contain the variable {message}
Failed to add icon to collection: {messa.description: A message with a variable {message} that can be replaced with the specific error message when adding an icon to a collection fails.

Failed to extract SVG exports: {error}.patternErrorMessage: The message must contain the variable {error}
Failed to extract SVG exports: {error}.description: A message with a variable {error} that can be replaced with the specific error message when extracting SVG exports fails.

Failed to initialize the extension theme.default: Failed to initialize the extension theme

File does not exist: {file}.patternErrorMessage: The message must contain the variable {file}
File does not exist: {file}.description: A message with a variable {file} that can be replaced with the specific file path when a file does not exist.

File with id {id} not found in cache..default: File with id {id} not found in cache.
File with id {id} not found in cache..patternErrorMessage: The message must contain the variable {id}
File with id {id} not found in cache..description: A message with a variable {id} that can be replaced with the specific file id when a file with that id is not found in the cache.

Group patterns changed. Reload the panel.default: Group patterns changed. Reload the panel to apply.

Icon collection \"{collection}\" has rea.default: Icon collection "{collection}" has reached its limit of {max} icons.
Icon collection \"{collection}\" has rea.patternErrorMessage: The message must contain the variables {collection} and {max}
Icon collection \"{collection}\" has rea.description: A message with variables {collection} and {max} that can be replaced with the specific collection name and the maximum number of icons when an icon collection has reached its limit of icons.

Icons in the temp directory cannot be ad.default: Icons in the temp directory cannot be added to the "{collection}" collection.
Icons in the temp directory cannot be ad.patternErrorMessage: The message must contain the variable {collection}
Icons in the temp directory cannot be ad.description: A message with a variable {collection} that can be replaced with the specific collection name when icons in the temp directory cannot be added to that collection.

Ignore directories changed. Reload the p.default: Ignore directories changed. Reload the panel to apply.

Invalid SVG tag: {tag}.patternErrorMessage: The message must contain the variable {tag}
Invalid SVG tag: {tag}.description: A message with a variable {tag} that can be replaced with the specific SVG tag when an invalid SVG tag is encountered.

Invalid {attr} attribute, expected \"{ex.patternErrorMessage: The message must contain the variables {attr}, {expected}, and {actual}
Invalid {attr} attribute, expected \"{ex.description: A message with variables {attr}, {expected}, and {actual} that can be replaced with the specific attribute name, expected value, and actual value when an invalid attribute is encountered.

No cache found for key: {key}.patternErrorMessage: The message must contain the variable {key}
No cache found for key: {key}.description: A message with a variable {key} that can be replaced with the specific cache key when no cache is found for that key.

No config found for key: {key}.patternErrorMessage: The message must contain the variable {key}
No config found for key: {key}.description: A message with a variable {key} that can be replaced with the specific config key when no config is found for that key.

No files found in the workspace..default: No files found in the workspace.

No handler found for message type: {type.default: No handler found for message type: {type}
No handler found for message type: {type.patternErrorMessage: The message must contain the variable {type}
No handler found for message type: {type.description: A message with a variable {type} that can be replaced with the specific message type when no handler is found for that message type.

No theme found for the current workspace.default: No theme found for the current workspace

Please enter at least 3 characters to se.default: Please enter at least 3 characters to search...

Processing {count} file(s)....patternErrorMessage: The message must contain the variable {count}
Processing {count} file(s)....description: A message with a variable {count} that can be replaced with the specific number of files being processed.

The \"Show not exported icons\" setting.default: The "Show not exported icons" setting changed. Reload the panel to apply.

The file was saved successfully at: {fil.default: The file was saved successfully at: {filePath}
The file was saved successfully at: {fil.patternErrorMessage: The message must contain the variable {filePath}
The file was saved successfully at: {fil.description: A message with a variable {filePath} that can be replaced with the specific file path where the file was saved successfully.

Theme not found for path: {path}.patternErrorMessage: The message must contain the variable {path}
Theme not found for path: {path}.description: A message with a variable {path} that can be replaced with the specific theme path when no theme is found for that path.

This file is temporary. Do you want to c.default: This file is temporary. Do you want to continue?
